name: Mt Washington Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Mt Washington Sports Complex in Mount Washington, KY! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms.

name: North Bullitt High School
description: Come play pickleball at North Bullitt High School in Hebron Estates, KY! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Shepherdsville Park
description: Shepherdsville Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Shepherdsville, KY. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.
